name: IQAir (AirVisual)
description: IQAir AirVisual provides real-time air quality and weather data from 30,000+ monitoring stations worldwide. The API offers AQI readings (US and China standards), pollutant concentrations (PM2.5, PM10, O3, NO2, SO2, CO), weather conditions, location-based lookups, 72-hour hourly forecasts, and 7-day daily AQI forecasts.

capabilities.name: city_data_get
capabilities.description: Get air quality and weather data for a specific city.

capabilities.name: nearest_city_data_get
capabilities.description: Get air quality for the nearest city to coordinates or IP.

capabilities.name: station_data_get
capabilities.description: Get air quality from a specific monitoring station.

capabilities.name: nearest_station_data_get
capabilities.description: Get air quality from the nearest monitoring station.

capabilities.name: cities_list
capabilities.description: List cities within a state that have monitoring data.

capabilities.name: stations_list
capabilities.description: List monitoring stations within a city.

capabilities.name: city_ranking_get
capabilities.description: Get global air quality ranking of major cities.
